tick_over_tick_delta_vs_1400.interpretation: STRATEGY QUIET TICK #4 on entry/exit cadence. FOURTH consecutive 30-min window with zero new BUY, zero new SELL, zero new submission. The cap-induced silence narrative (from 13:30/14:00) holds — with the 0.65 deployed cap binding 7.52 pp under full-fill projection and three OPEN orders sitting aged at limit prices, no organic admission path exists. Live SL-trailing on PNBHOUSING (+24 bp) AND SUNPHARMA (+29 bp) this tick reinforces decision-layer health: strategy IS active on stop hygiene, just blocked from entry/exit by the cap. Book gave back ₹499 (-14 bps) over the window — first observed erosion of the session — driven primarily by MAHABANK -28 bps and SUNPHARMA -29 bps, partially offset by PNBHOUSING +5 bps and TORNTPOWER +10 bps. Risk level HELD at MEDIUM, NOT raised to HIGH because: (a) Trigger D composite firing requires 2+ legs and only the silence leg fires; book-positive and no-distress means the composite cannot reach HIGH structurally without a fresh distress signal; (b) the order ageing has a strategy-layer remedy (cancel-vs-reprice), not a risk-monitor lever response; (c) deployment cap is doing exactly what it was set to do — bind admissions until SELL frees deployment. Risk level NOT lowered to LOW because: (a) all three OPEN orders are now past their age-flag thresholds, (b) book is now in modest retracement vs strengthening, (c) deployment cap remains binding, (d) Power cluster 4-name structure persists at 2.28 pp buffer to sector cap, (e) NESTLEIND tightest-SL-in-book at 42 bps remains observable risk.

Trigger D (composite distress HIGH/CRITICAL meta) FIRES 1-of-3 LEGS: silence ≥2h CROSSES THRESHOLD (135 min, 15 min over 2h line). Other legs dormant: book P&L POSITIVE +₹3,013 (+0.30%, 80 bps above the -0.5% leg-fire line); no single-name <-7% (MAHABANK -2.72% strongest distress signal, 4.28 pp from -7% line). Composite firing requires 2+ legs concurrent. Book-positive and no-distress means HIGH escalation structurally NOT REACHED. To re-arm composite to 2-of-3, would need either book to slip below -0.5% (need ₹8,031 erosion from current +₹3,013) OR a single-name to drop below -7% (MAHABANK would need to drop to LTP ₹75.79 from current ₹79.28).

actions_taken: NO LEVER CHANGES. All seven active overrides held at 12:30 levels: min_confidence=0.65, max_position_pct=0.15, max_deployed_pct=0.65, default_sl_pct=0.015, min_sl_pct=0.01, max_sl_pct=0.04, max_sector_pct=0.22. Zero pre-armed TIGHTENING triggers fired in this 30-min window — FOURTH consecutive zero-tightening tick. Tightening levers in the absence of a firing trigger would be theatrical, would deepen admission friction without addressing any live risk vector, and would conflict with the persisting Trigger S finding that the current cap is *already* over-restrictive (cap-induced entry silence now 135 min, FOURTH consecutive zero-trade tick).

TRIGGER D FIRES 1-of-3 LEGS → NO ACTION. The silence leg crosses the 2h threshold (135 min observed); however, composite distress requires 2+ legs concurrent. Book +₹3,013 (+0.30%) sits 80 bps above the -0.5% leg-fire line. MAHABANK -2.72% sits 4.28 pp from -7% leg-fire line. Single-leg firing on silence ALONE is by spec INSUFFICIENT for HIGH risk escalation — the spec was explicit at 14:00: '2-of-3 fire → HIGH risk escalation'. Documenting the 1-of-3 firing rather than acting on it preserves trigger discipline. Re-arm conditions for 2-of-3: book P&L slips below -0.5% (~₹8,031 erosion required) OR MAHABANK breaches -7% (LTP drop from ₹79.28 to ₹75.79). Neither is imminent.

TRIGGER S CONDITION PERSISTS → NO ACTION (out-of-mandate, parked). The 14:00 fired-no-action handoff covers this tick: silence is now 30 min deeper but the lever direction (max_deployed_pct relaxation) remains outside risk_monitor scope. Continued hand-off to strategy_layer EOD review is the appropriate path; no risk-monitor action available without re-firing on a HIGH escalation pathway (which is structurally blocked by book-positive and no-distress conditions).

Risk level HELD at MEDIUM (not raised to HIGH or CRITICAL — Trigger D fires only 1-of-3 legs; not lowered to LOW — see drivers below). Drivers for HOLD: (i) book pulled back ₹499 over 30 min — first observed retracement, dispersion inverted to 6 weakening / 3 strengthening; (ii) all three OPEN orders now past their age-flag thresholds (TATAPOWER 47 min over 210-min line, HINDZINC 47 min over 180-min line, PHARMABEES 15 min over 2h line); (iii) deployment cap remains binding 7.52 pp under projection; (iv) Power cluster 4-name structure persists at 2.28 pp buffer; (v) Trigger D silence leg has now crossed the 2h hard threshold (single-leg firing); (vi) NESTLEIND SL buffer at 42 bps remains tightest in book; (vii) SUNPHARMA flipped negative for the first time since admission. None of these is a fresh distress signal individually, but collectively they prevent step-down to LOW. One favorable book-day continued does NOT yet constitute a regime change.

Logged the 135-min entry/exit silence (FOURTH consecutive zero-trade tick) as Trigger D 1-of-3 firing. Logged TWO live SL-trailing events this tick (PNBHOUSING +24 bp, SUNPHARMA +29 bp) as evidence of decision-layer health — the silence is purely entry/exit, NOT paralysis. The SUNPHARMA trail-up DESPITE LTP weakening is particularly notable: it's an aggressive (closer-to-LTP) trail rather than a defensive widen, indicating the strategy is actively tightening risk parameters on positions while the cap blocks new admissions.

Logged TATAPOWER (257 min, +47 PAST 210-min flag), HINDZINC (227 min, +47 PAST 180-min flag), and PHARMABEES (135 min, JUST CROSSED 2h mark) OPEN-order ageing as escalating observability for the next strategy_review tick. All three OPEN orders are now stale; cancel-vs-reprice decisions are strategy-layer; risk monitor only intervenes on cluster/cap/loss-gate vectors.

Logged the first observed unrealized retracement of the session: book gave back ₹499 (-14 bps) between 13:42 and 14:11 snapshots. Dispersion inverted: 6 names weakening (MAHABANK, SUNPHARMA, NTPC, GOLDBEES, HINDUNILVR, POWERGRID) vs 3 strengthening (PNBHOUSING, NESTLEIND, TORNTPOWER). Single-tick MTM noise, not a regime change — but worth tracking next tick to see whether the pullback persists or reverses.

Pre-armed triggers carry forward to 15:00 unchanged in spec; their thresholds tick closer to firing as time passes (silence extension to 165 min, order ageing further). Trigger D moves from 1-of-3 firing to 2-of-3 firing if book slips below -0.5% (₹8,031 erosion) or MAHABANK breaches -7%. Trigger S remains parked out-of-mandate.
